history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man with dark, wavy hair and white-rimmed sunglasses stands in a room decorated with various vintage signs and logos. He is wearing a white zip-up hoodie over a black t-shirt with a graphic print of a motorcycle and skulls, and black pants with embroidered designs. The background features a red "EXIT" sign, circular logos with red and white elements, framed license plates with text like "PATRO," and other assorted signs for brands like "GUIL SUPR MOTO," "GR LIVE," and "Mobil Tires." The lighting is somewhat dim, casting shadows and highlighting the textures of the wall and the objects. The overall mood is urban, edgy, and retro, with a color palette dominated by black, white, red, and muted metallic tones.
